pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 11-27: CSV file is explicitly created at this path with mkdir and cat redirection
setup_task.sh lines 14-21: CSV contains exactly 8 users with these usernames in the first column. CSV parsing confirms all usernames match.

privileged_info_summary: The bulk_user_upload task uses synthetic test data created during setup. The CSV file is generated at /home/ga/Documents/new_staff_upload.csv containing 8 staff user accounts: tnguyen, rkapoor, lchen, mhernandez, sproctor, jokwu, kfischer, and dpatel. Five of these users (tnguyen, rkapoor, lchen, mhernandez, sproctor) are configured for enrollment in the BIO101 course, while three (jokwu, kfischer, dpatel) have no course assignment. The course shortname is BIO101 with full name 'Introduction to Biology'. All user accounts include valid email addresses following the pattern username@healthorg.com and are created with password 'Onboard2024!'.
